title: oxytheca dendroidea var. foliosa
intro: Oxytheca dendroidea var. foliosa, also known as the coastal woodland plant or woodland oxytheca, is a rare and endangered shrub native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oxytheca dendroidea var. foliosa include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, it is typically used in infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
